channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy Seemingly Coming to Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
A new rating for Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy has been spotted, hinting at an imminent Switch 2 release.

Nintendo has made it clear with the latest Switch 2 console that third-party games are now a thing. We have already seen titles like Cyberpunk 2077, Resident Evil Requiem, and many more released on the platform. Now, it seems like Nintendo is moving towards bringing Marvel into the fray as well.

Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy Rated for Switch 2 in Taiwan

Spotted by Gematsu, the Taiwan Digital Game Rating Committee has rated Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy for the Switch 2. The platform clearly mentions Switch 2, the rating is PG-12, and the company is listed as Koch Media GmbH. However, the launch date section says “not approved”, so we don’t know when it could be released for the platform.

For those unaware, Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy is a story-focused, single-player third-person action-adventure developed by Eidos-Montréal. The title has you playing as the titular Star-Lord in an original story where the characters are caught up in another struggle over the fate of the universe.

You play as Star-Lord, but you can call any of the Guardians to your aid and have them use their signature attacks on the enemies. Having played the game myself, I can say this game has some of the best writing and adrenaline-fueled action sequences that a Marvel fan will thoroughly enjoy.

In other news, here’s more about the new Marvel Rivals update, which adds the Lower Manhattan map. Additionally, new leaks indicate that another iconic Marvel character is set to appear in Fortnite. What are your thoughts on Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy coming to the Switch 2? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Professor Layton and the New World of Steam devs confirming a PS5 and Stream release. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Professor Layton and the New World of Steam PS5 and Steam Release Confirmed
item.content:encoded:
During the latest Level5 stream, it was revealed that Professor Layton and the New World of Steam will be coming to PS5 and Steam alongside the Switch 1 and Switch 2 releases.

In April 2025, during the Nintendo Switch 2 Direct presentation, it was announced that “Professor Layton and the New World of Steam” would be released for Nintendo’s new console. However, many fans were curious if the game would also be available on other platforms. The developers have now answered these wishes, along with a glimpse into the game’s features.

Professor Layton and the New World of Steam is Coming to More Platforms

At the latest Level5 Vision 2026 Craftsmanship livestream, it was announced that Professor Layton and the New World of Steam is releasing for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam as well. We were also informed about the new features, the game features, puzzles, voice actors, and theme song of the upcoming title.

Regarding the new features, players will see the addition of a coin radar, a world map, and updated movement. Puzzles will help your town grow, and players will meet new companion characters. The game also features cutscenes in “Full 3D” with mouse support for all platforms except Nintendo Switch.

Coming to game features, Puzzles are the main focus, helping progress the story. The Puzzle design is by QuizKnock, and Professor Layton and the New World of Steam features the most puzzles in series history. These can also be solved using touch controls on supported platforms, and players will receive puzzle hints, hint coins, and a memo to help solve puzzles.

Professor Layton and the New World of Steam is set in America and features a town “fueled by invention” that is the hiding place for a great mystery. The game will also see Layton and Luke Reunite as they meet a host of unique characters. Check out the voice cast for the game below:

  • Professor Layton: Yo Oizumi
  • Luke: Mio Imada
  • Elinora & Elida: Riho Yoshioka
  • Eggmuffin: Mahiro Takasugi
  • Allinston: Shinya Kote
  • Sheriff Bobsley: Koichi Yamadera
  • Falcon: Akio Otsuka
  • Mystella: Michaela Wako Sato

Last but not least, the theme song will be composed by Joe Hisaishi, and the lyrics & vocals will be from Lilas.

The bright gold 007 First Light Limited Edition DualSense Wireless controller for the PS5 has been revealed. Additionally, a dataminer has found mentions of SteamGPT, which could help with platform support and CS2 anti-cheat. What are your thoughts on Professor Layton and the New World of Steam releasing for PS5 and Steam? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Crimson Desert developers revealing upcoming features and content. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Does Windrose Have Multiplayer Or Co-Op?
item.content:encoded:
Windrose is ready to bring the pirate fantasy to life, but a core part of that is assembling your hearty crew. Who better to join you aboard your ship than your best pals, but is that possible in Windrose?

When the concept of Windrose was first conceived, the game was originally planned to be an open-world MMO, where online multiplayer was at the core of the experience. However, some huge changes to the development plan have been made since then, with the title shifting to a more narrative experience.

Does that mean that multiplayer is entirely out of the window for Windrose? There’s hope yet, as Insider Gaming has the answers below.

Does Windrose Have Multiplayer?

Gather your friends, as Windrose does offer multiplayer, with up to four players being able to form a crew and tackle the entirety of the game together.

It might not be the massive multiplayer experience that some may have hoped for, but despite the game’s shift to a more narrative experience, the Windrose Crew still made sure to keep multiplayer viable for the player base.

  • More Insider Gaming: Windrose Early Access Release Date Countdown

This feature comes fully supported with both self-hosted and dedicated servers, so you can even join other players’ servers if you’d so wish! And, if you want to play in numerous games but don’t want to lose your character’s progress, worry not, as you can carry over your progress between worlds.

Does Windrose Have Co-Op?

Windrose’s multiplayer capacities are strictly online co-op, meaning you can’t team up with friends locally, and you can’t fight one another in opposing vessels.

It’s not all too surprising, with many games ditching local multiplayer in favour of online modes instead, but it does make more sense with Windrose due to its complexity and PC exclusivity.

  • More Insider Gaming: Is Windrose On PlayStation, Xbox, Or Nintendo Switch?

However, even if you’re playing online, you’ll be restricted to co-op, as you won’t be able to fight against your friends. Instead, you’ll be forced to work together, so unless your buddy agrees, you can’t make them walk the plank—even if they deserve it.

Will you be playing Windrose with friends? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming multiplayer guides, check out the following:

  • Slay The Spire 2
  • Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream
  • Crimson Desert

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: When Does Diablo 4 Season 12 End? Diablo Season 13 Lord of Hatred Expansion Start Date & Times, Explained
item.content:encoded:
As we move through 2026, it’s nearly time for another major expansion in Diablo 4, and that’s the Lord of Hatred update that brings Season 12 to an end, and kickstarts Season 13 in style. Check out Lord of Hatred’s start date and times.

Diablo 4 Season 13 Lord of Hatred is the natural successor to 2025’s Vessel of Hatred. There’s a lot of anger in Diablo 4, isn’t there? Season 12’s Season Slaughter has been a good one, but it’s time to see what hell awaits in Blizzard’s next Diablo 4 expansion.

Diablo 4 Season 12 End Date

Diablo 4 Season 12 Season Slaughter ends on April 28, meaning you haven’t got long left until the next one begins.

Season 12 introduced a wealth of new gameplay features: The Killstreak System, Bloodied Sigils, as well as the insanely cool touch where you get to play as The Butcher!

  • More Insider Gaming: Diablo 4 Gets Major Skill Tree Updates & More in Upcoming DLC

As with all seasonal updates, the content and novelty grow stale, and luckily for you and Blizzard, something cool is up next—Season 13 and the Lord of Hatred expansion for 2026.

When Does Diablo 4 Season 13 Lord of Hatred Start? Dates & Times, Explained

Diablo 4’s Season 13 ‘Lord of Hatred’ content is expected to go live on April 28, and it should have a start time of 10 AM PT.

It’s hard to believe we’re at Season 13 already, but this is a special one because it introduces Lord of Hatred. It brings with it the Paladin Class, the Warlock, and much more.

  • More Insider Gaming: Diablo 4’s Chinese Version Has Been Censored in a Weird Way

For a more accurate release time closer to your region or time zone, check out this table, complete with dates and times.

Which aspect of Lord of Hatred has got you the most excited? Has it got the potential to top Vessel of Hatred? Let us know through the Insider Gaming Discord, and share what you think about the state of Diablo 4 right now.

For more content, read about Crimson Desert devs revealing upcoming features and content, and a Metal Gear Solid movie adaptation being officially confirmed.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton
